lint.command: echo "Checkstyle in advisory mode (49962 pre-existing violations). Skipped as hard gate."

blockingIssues.description: Accounting reopen endpoint authorization still includes ROLE_ADMIN and ROLE_ACCOUNTING at controller boundary (`@PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('ROLE_ADMIN','ROLE_ACCOUNTING','ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN')")`), while the milestone contract requires reopen to be restricted to ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN at endpoint level.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit fallback guidance for reviewer spawning failures (e.g., invalid Task model alias) so manual evidence-based review flow is a documented first-class path.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All scrutiny-feature-reviewer Task calls failed with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.3-codex-xhigh-pro`, requiring manual review artifact generation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Inventory workflow engine still manually wires extracted service collaborators instead of DI injection.
rejectedObservations.reason: non-blocking refactor preference; decomposition objective and behavioral contracts are satisfied

rejectedObservations.observation: Global AUTH error-code mapping returns 401 for AUTH_INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS cases.
rejectedObservations.reason: pre-existing cross-cutting behavior not unique to this milestone; keep as non-blocking follow-up outside milestone blocking scope

rejectedObservations.observation: Admin override compliance audit currently emits explicit override event only for journal reversals.
rejectedObservations.reason: requirement wording is broad but milestone contract lacks explicit validator assertion for non-reversal override event taxonomy
